cit.note: Impuesto a las Ganancias — Sociedades; flat 35% on net taxable income

income_tax_2025.note: Impuesto a las Ganancias — Personas Fisicas; progressive 5-35%; thresholds indexed to MNI (Minimo No Imponible)

iva.note: IVA: 21% general; 10.5% reduced (food staples, medicine, certain construction); 27% on utilities for non-final consumers

ingresos_brutos.note: Ingresos Brutos: provincial turnover tax; typical 3% (varies by province and activity)

impuesto_al_cheque.note: Impuesto a los Debitos y Creditos Bancarios (IDCB); 0.6% on bank debits and credits

social_security_employer.note: Contribuciones patronales: SIPA 17% + obra social 6% + ART ~3% (approximate)

inflation_adjustment.note: Ajuste integral por inflacion mandatory in hyperinflationary context; IPC used as deflator

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Entity type, local, provincial/state, surtax, relief, filing, withholding, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, municipal, provincial/state, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
